chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 215 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.646/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Perusal of record reflects that after filing instant Petition on 23-08-2025 no one has turned up to pursue this Petition. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, this Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI/PS
